creator: ariff@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry, I had to close this PR: 

1) snd_hda is not part of official / supported 6.x branch 
(though the binary modules / patch exist). 
2) The effective way to solve / debug this issue is to 
join #freebsd-azalia @ irc.freenode.net. This is a known 
issue in few HP boards, and I expect the owner to come 
to this irc channel. 
3) Due to lack of hardwares, I can't do much except some hit 
and miss brute attempt, hence requiring you (originator) to 
present himself in above irc channel. 
4) As a temporary workaround, use mixer "speaker" to control / mute 
it. 

Please consider #2 . We're lacking people with target hardware 
to participate with the experimentations. 

Thank You.
